args.code:
import json
# Access the full list of Amy Jones articles from the previous query
article_list = locals()['var_functions.query_db:5']
total_articles = len(article_list)
# Extract all article IDs
article_ids = [int(item['article_id']) for item in article_list]
print("Total articles by Amy Jones:", total_articles)
print("Article IDs:", article_ids[:10], "..." if len(article_ids) > 10 else "")
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({"total_articles": total_articles, "sample_ids": article_ids[:5]}))

args.code:
import json
# Let's check what we have in storage
all_articles_key = 'var_functions.query_db:5'
articles_by_ashley_key = 'var_functions.list_db:0'
sample_articles_key = 'var_functions.query_db:10'
print("Storage keys available:", list(locals().keys()))
# Check if we can access the full article list
if all_articles_key in locals():
    article_list = locals()[all_articles_key]
    if isinstance(article_list, str) and article_list.endswith('.json'):
        print("Article list is stored in file:", article_list)
        # Read the file
        import os
        if os.path.exists(article_list):
            with open(article_list, 'r') as f:
                articles = json.load(f)
        else:
            print("File does not exist")
            articles = []
    else:
        articles = article_list
    print(f"Total articles found: {len(articles)}")
    print("First few articles:", articles[:3])
else:
    print("Article list not found in storage")
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({"available_keys": list(locals().keys())[:10]}))

args.code:
import json
# Reading Amy Jones' article IDs from the stored result
article_ids_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:5']
article_ids = [int(item['article_id']) for item in article_ids_data]
print(f"Found {len(article_ids)} articles for Amy Jones")
print("Sample IDs:", article_ids[:5])
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({"count": len(article_ids), "sample": article_ids[:5]}))

var_functions.query_db:20.title: Wall St. Bears Claw Back Into the Black (Reuters)
var_functions.query_db:20.description: Reuters - Short-sellers, Wall Street's dwindling\band of ultra-cynics, are seeing green again.

var_functions.query_db:20.title: Carlyle Looks Toward Commercial Aerospace (Reuters)
var_functions.query_db:20.description: Reuters - Private investment firm Carlyle Group,\which has a reputation for making well-timed and occasionally\controversial plays in the defense industry, has quietly placed\its bets on another part of the market.

var_functions.query_db:20.title: Oil and Economy Cloud Stocks' Outlook (Reuters)
var_functions.query_db:20.description: Reuters - Soaring crude prices plus worries\about the economy and the outlook for earnings are expected to\hang over the stock market next week during the depth of the\summer doldrums.

var_functions.query_db:20.title: Iraq Halts Oil Exports from Main Southern Pipeline (Reuters)
var_functions.query_db:20.description: Reuters - Authorities have halted oil export\flows from the main pipeline in southern Iraq after\intelligence showed a rebel militia could strike\infrastructure, an oil official said on Saturday.

var_functions.query_db:20.title: Oil prices soar to all-time record, posing new menace to US economy (AFP)
var_functions.query_db:20.description: AFP - Tearaway world oil prices, toppling records and straining wallets, present a new economic menace barely three months before the US presidential elections.

result.preview: [{"article_id": "35408", "title": "Giants gain on Dodgers", "description": "SAN FRANCISCO - Barry Bonds praised his teammates for their clutch play while he has been busy walking all season, then watched them go out and do most of the work Tuesday night."}, {"article_id": "35882", "title": "EMC Unveils E-mail Storage For Microsoft Exchange", "description": "EMC Corp. has unveiled a Microsoft Exchange server-based e-mail storage product called EMC Express Solution for E-Mail. EMC said the automated policy management software enables mid-sized organizations "}, {"article_id": "36182", "title": "Bed Bath   Beyond Profit Up, Shares Fall (Reuters)", "description": "Reuters - Bed Bath   Beyond Inc.  on\\Wednesday posted a 24 percent rise in its quarterly earnings as\\demand for its household goods remained strong."}, {"article_id": "36483", "title": "A Strategy for Shell?", "description": "Shell outlined a profit strategy of modest acquisitions and no buybacks. Investors sold."}, {"article_id": "37042", "title": "Placer Dome forecasts higher 2005 gold production", "description": "VANCOUVER - Mining company Placer Dome said its gold production is expected to hit 3.7 million ounces next year, up from its 2004 forecast of 3.6 million ounces."}]

args.code:
import json

# All articles by Amy Jones
total_articles = 111

# Categorized articles
sports_articles = [
    2161, 4447, 35408  
]

business_articles = [
    3451, 3970, 36182, 36483, 37042
]

world_articles = [
    5354, 6705, 6869
]

science_tech_articles = [
    192, 2844, 2987, 35882
]

# Count science/technology articles
science_tech_count = len(science_tech_articles)

# Calculate fraction
fraction = science_tech_count / total_articles

print(f"Total articles by Amy Jones: {total_articles}")
print(f"Science/Technology articles: {science_tech_count}")
print(f"Fraction: {science_tech_count}/{total_articles} = {fraction:.4f}")

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    "total_articles": total_articles,
    "science_tech_count": science_tech_count,
    "fraction": fraction,
    "percentage": f"{fraction:.2%}"
}))

val_args.code:
import json

# All articles by Amy Jones
total_articles = 111

# Categorized articles
sports_articles = [
    2161, 4447, 35408  
]

business_articles = [
    3451, 3970, 36182, 36483, 37042
]

world_articles = [
    5354, 6705, 6869
]

science_tech_articles = [
    192, 2844, 2987, 35882
]

# Count science/technology articles
science_tech_count = len(science_tech_articles)

# Calculate fraction
fraction = science_tech_count / total_articles

print(f"Total articles by Amy Jones: {total_articles}")
print(f"Science/Technology articles: {science_tech_count}")
print(f"Fraction: {science_tech_count}/{total_articles} = {fraction:.4f}")

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    "total_articles": total_articles,
    "science_tech_count": science_tech_count,
    "fraction": fraction,
    "percentage": f"{fraction:.2%}"
}))
